title: Tinker Time
description:
Navigating through an [red][sine]endless sea of corpses[/sine][/red], you find a [orange]mad scientist[/orange] scavenging for various scraps.

"Yes. Hi, hello! You look like a capable fighter... I need a tester for my next [green]atrocity device[/green]! How about it?"

options.title: Accept
options.description: Create a custom card to add to your [gold]Deck[/gold].

notes:
This is a [gold]multi-stage branching event[/gold]. After accepting, you proceed through two choice stages:

[gold]Stage 1 - Choose Card Type:[/gold] Select from 2 randomly chosen card types:
• [blue]Weapon[/blue] (Attack card)
• [blue]Protector[/blue] (Skill card)
• [blue]Gadget[/blue] (Power card)

[gold]Stage 2 - Choose Rider Effect:[/gold] Select from 2 randomly chosen effects based on your card type:

[orange]Attack riders:[/orange]
• [blue]Sapping:[/blue] Apply 2 Weak and 2 Vulnerable
• [blue]Violence:[/blue] Hits 2 additional times
• [blue]Choking:[/blue] Whenever you play a card this turn, the enemy loses 6 HP

[orange]Skill riders:[/orange]
• [blue]Energized:[/blue] Gain 2 Energy
• [blue]Wisdom:[/blue] Draw 3 cards
• [blue]Chaos:[/blue] Add a random card into your Hand. It costs 0 Energy this turn

[orange]Power riders:[/orange]
• [blue]Expertise:[/blue] Gain 2 Strength and 2 Dexterity
• [blue]Curious:[/blue] Powers cost 1 Energy less
• [blue]Improvement:[/blue] At the end of combat, Upgrade a random card

[gold]Outcome:[/gold] Your completed custom Mad Science card is added to your deck.
